image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about open data replication than social media does.
Context visual: Open data replication means sharing research data openly, allowing anyone to verify results.
Escalation visual: Yet, many studies struggle with reproducibility. Why?
Evidence visual: Research shows around 50% of studies can’t be replicated. This isn't due to fraud but complexity.
Pattern Interrupt visual: And unlike social media hype, science demands scrutiny.
Payoff visual: Open data can strengthen trust and lead to better health outcomes. It’s a game changer.
Cta visual: Follow for more insights on how open data can transform science!
